productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Casual Silver Flats
description: The perfect way to complement your party wear is to slip into these comfy slippers from carlton london. The padded synthetic straps with a padded comfy foootbed is designed with much care to ensure your feet the best of comfort and complement your ethnic wear with ease.UpperSynthetic midfoot straps in a knotted style, with a toe separator to lock the foot in placePadded and glittery footbed for all-day comfort and styleOutsoleTextured durable rubber outsole with a floral groove on the forefoot for absolute grip and tractionSlipper careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
